user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new change request approver, so that attendance change requests are routed to the correct approvers
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Change Request Approvers screen; When I click Add new change request approver and define the approver(s) and applicability; Then the approver configuration is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search approvers by location, department and position, so that I can quickly find the relevant approver configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Change Request Approvers screen; When I select a location, department and position and click Search; Then only matching approver records are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can clear my selection and view all approvers again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied search filters; When I click Reset; Then the filters clear and the full list is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the payroll period date, so that change request approval rules align with the monthly payroll cycle
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Change Request Approvers screen; When I select the payroll period date of every month and Save; Then the payroll period date is applied

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable second level approval for change requests after the payroll date, so that late change requests get additional oversight
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Change Request Approvers screen; When I enable second level approval for change requests after payroll date and Save; Then a second approval level is enforced for post-payroll requests

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration step, so that I can complete the attendance setup flow efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured change request approvers; When I click Save & Next; Then my settings are saved and I proceed to the next screen
